description: Evals for brief-to-specs — verifies triggering accuracy and functional behavior

evals.prompt: Create a SPEC.md from the brief for the checkout feature
evals.description: Trigger using output file name as the intent signal

evals.prompt: Transform the BRIEF.md into user stories with acceptance criteria
evals.description: Trigger via downstream artifact language — user stories + ACs

evals.prompt: Generate a plan from the spec
evals.description: Should trigger spec-to-plan, not brief-to-specs — planning step

evals.prompt: Write a brief for a new payment feature
evals.description: Should trigger create-brief, not brief-to-specs — upstream step
